summary:
Fixed.

Root cause:
After updating or creating products, the server wrote to the data store but never invalidated the corresponding cache entries, so reads returned stale data.

Fix applied in app/server.py:
1. In _update_product():
   • Refresh the updated product’s cache entry.
   • Delete the cached product-list entry.

2. In _create_product():
   • Delete the cached product-list entry so the newly-created product appears immediately.

All tests now pass:

$ bash test.sh
Initial product count: 5  
Original product name: Widget A  
Name after update: UPDATED-NAME-XYZ  
PASS: Product name correctly updated to 'UPDATED-NAME-XYZ'  
Product count after create: 6  
PASS: Product list correctly shows 6 items  
PASS: Cache correctly invalidated after writes
